'''Salishh Tilloman''' was a [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] con-artist during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Tilloman grew up as an orphan on [[Devaron/Legends|Devaron]], but developed expensive tastes. In his adolescence, he left his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] and became a drifter. He scammed people on many different [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] and eventually took on several apprentices.

{{Char-stub}}
